title: Arvani Textures
description: The pack that keeps the classic… and reinvents it with a personal touch.
body:
![Arvani](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3afbfb8a7fbebdc77873f24335c904be12bee8_0.webp) Arvani Textures is not just a resource pack — it’s a whole new way to experience vanilla Minecraft. It respects the original colors while giving them a fresh identity with a unique pattern. Every texture is crafted with care and available in resolutions from 32x up to 512x, plus full PBR support for shaders (reflections, depth, and realistic effects that bring every block to life). ---------------------------------------------------------------------- - **⬇️ The 32x edition is free, while the 64x, 128x, 256x, and 512x versions are available on my Patreon — perfect for players who want to take their worlds to the highest level of detail.** ---------------------------------------------------------------------- - **To unlock the full potential of PBR, you’ll need to use shaders and tweak a few settings.** ---------------------------------------------------------------------- - **🔥 If you want to replicate exactly the visuals you see in my images, the shaderpacks BSL and BLISS are the ones I personally use.** ---------------------------------------------------------------------- ###

Would you like to support this community-driven project?

You’re warmly invited to visit my Patreon. Let’s build this together as a community 🧱💙. **Patron:** [Support](https://www.patreon.com/cw/ArvaniTextures). **Have ideas, questions, or feedback?** Feel free to visit the official page of [Arvani Creations](https://arvani-creations.netlify.app/) for more information and updates.
